_comment: FutBattle sound contract. `path` is extension-less under /public/audio — SoundManager loads <path>.webm then falls back to <path>.wav (placeholders). Drop a real CC0 .webm at the same path to swap a sound with zero code change. `desc` guides the CC0 search.

ui.move.desc: PES PS2 cursor move: very short, dry, high-pitched blip on hover/arrow navigation (~40ms).

ui.confirm.desc: Confirm selection: lower/heavier than move, slight body/thunk (~90ms).

ui.tick.desc: Counter/roulette tick: tiny high triangle, safe to spam.

ui.stamp.desc: Rubber-stamp slam for 'CONVOCADO'/official decisions: low thud + paper snap.

transition.whoosh.desc: Console-style screen wipe whoosh (~280ms noise sweep).

dado.roll.desc: Dice rolling: shake (rattling) then a drop/settle (~0.8s).

card.reveal.desc: Common player revealed: short positive flick (~0.3s).

card.reveal.rare.desc: 88+ rated reveal: brighter sting with shimmer (~0.6s).

card.reveal.legendary.desc: Legendary reveal: epic ~2s sting (brass swell + sparkle); ducks music while it plays.

whistle.end.desc: Referee long triple whistle for full-time.

crowd.loop.desc: Stadium ambience: seamless looping crowd murmur.

crowd.tension.desc: Tense final minutes of a close game: rising murmur/anticipation.

match.trophy.desc: Champion fanfare: rising brass arpeggio + roar.

match.eliminated.desc: Elimination: crowd deflates, sad descending tones.

menu.theme.desc: Main menu loop: upbeat arcade football theme.

copa.theme.desc: Cup/bracket screen loop: anthemic, tournament feel.

anthem.desc: Pre-match loop: stadium anthem / team walkout vibe.
